title: Syzygium multinerve

This family includes over 3,000 species and is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Syzygium multinerve belongs to the genus Syzygium, which is a group of flowering plants that are often referred to as the 'water apple' or 'jambu'. Syzygium multinerve is a specific species within this genus and is likely native to a particular region within its native range.
